2302930.name: OMSI 2 Add-on IVECO Bus-Familie Überland Evadys
2302930.description:
Created to be versatile and designed for missions on national roads, airport shuttles, trips and excursions, the new Evadys is a perfect model. He is a true expert in operational versatility. This model series now makes its debut in OMSI2 – The Bus Simulator.

It can be used as an airport coach but also for intercity transport. The Evadys is a truly versatile touring coach.

Evadys Line

Designed for regional routes, they are optimised for passenger comfort.

Its luggage racks, seats with armrests and reduced seating arrangement provide a comfortable and personal space for each passenger.

Evadys Pro


Designed for excursions and short trips, they are optimized for passenger comfort.

Ultra-comfortable and reclining passenger seats, passenger lighting and individual air intakes, standard air conditioning, tables with cup holders, this coach is made to transport your passengers, in comfort, over long distances, with an unprecedented amount of luggage in the hold.

Features

  • Versatile models
  • Airport, tourist and intercity versions
  • Authentic design
  • Real sounds
  • Different door layouts
  • Different setvars
  • Various repaints of popular freeware and payware maps available
  • Easy to use repaints
2302930.supported_languages:
英语, 德语*, 法语
*具有完全音频支持的语言
